p2p_enrich.notes: Added 3 P2P tests: (1) test_repo_benchmarks_node_syntax - checks node --check on scripts/benchmarks/bundle-size/*.mjs, (2) test_repo_scripts_node_syntax - checks node --check on scripts/*.mjs, (3) test_repo_prettier_formatting - runs npx prettier --check on benchmark scripts. CI commands verified: node --check works on all .mjs files, npx prettier --check works. Skipped: full test/lint/build suites require pnpm/nx which are not available in base Docker image without network installs.
